sentences.english: I need to shoot off right after the recording.
I have a dentist appointment, and I can't be late again.
sentences.korean: 치과 예약이 있어서 또 늦으면 안 돼요.

sentences.english: 'Shoot off' means to leave quickly because you're in a hurry or there's somewhere you need to be.
sentences.korean: 'shoot off'는 급하거나 가야 할 곳이 있어서 빨리 떠나는 뜻이에요.

sentences.english: If you need to leave early, you might say, 'Sorry, but I have to shoot off after this.'
sentences.korean: 일찍 떠나야 하면 '미안, 이거 끝나고 가야 해'라고 할 수 있어요.
